'''basafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qirsh|qirsh]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qirsh|qirsh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| basafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæsæfæth|bæsæfæth]] || [[word:bæsæfæj|bæsæfæj]] || [[word:bæsæfæsh|bæsæfæsh]] || [[word:bæsæfæ|bæsæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:basasafath|basasafath]] || [[word:basasafaj|basasafaj]] || [[word:basasafash|basasafash]] || [[word:basasafa|basasafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:basafath|basafath]] || [[word:basafaj|basafaj]] || [[word:basafash|basafash]] || [[word:basafa|basafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:basaffath|basaffath]] || [[word:basaffaj|basaffaj]] || [[word:basaffash|basaffash]] || [[word:basaffaf|basaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:basafatha|basafatha]] || [[word:basafaja|basafaja]] || [[word:basafasha|basafasha]] || [[word:basafaka|basafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:basafath|basafath]] || [[word:basafaj|basafaj]] || [[word:basafash|basafash]] || [[word:basafa|basafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:basafathal|basafathal]] || [[word:basafajal|basafajal]] || [[word:basafashal|basafashal]] || [[word:basafakal|basafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:basafathatha|basafathatha]] || [[word:basafajaja|basafajaja]] || [[word:basafashasha|basafashasha]] || [[word:basafaka|basafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:basafathan|basafathan]] || [[word:basafajan|basafajan]] || [[word:basafashan|basafashan]] || [[word:basafakan|basafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:basafathaoro|basafathaoro]] || [[word:basafajaoro|basafajaoro]] || [[word:basafashaoro|basafashaoro]] || [[word:basafakaoro|basafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
